content: I was at home with Rohan in Ballabhgarh on the 15th. I didn’t know anything about the kidnapping until I saw the news. I haven’t been to Vikram’s office since June. I didn’t print any documents. I didn’t know about the bank receipt. I didn’t speak to Manoj Verma in years. I was in a bad place emotionally after the divorce, but I would never hurt Arjun. He’s my son too. I love him. I don’t know why my DNA was on his bag. Maybe I hugged him that morning? I packed his lunch. Maybe I touched the strap. But I didn’t do anything illegal. I’m not a criminal.
